sections.heading: What is Sessions & Cookies?
sections.body: Server-side sessions, cookies, and session-based authentication. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Sessions & Cookies is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Sessions & Cookies is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Sessions & Cookies every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Sessions & Cookies implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Sessions & Cookies is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

jargon.definition: A key concept in Sessions & Cookies. Understanding this term is essential for mastering the topic.

summary: Sessions & Cookies is a core concept in auth. Server-side sessions, cookies, and session-based authentication. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
